---
title: "Data"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Data}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# Data Source

The datasets used in this study are publicly available and can be accessed through the [data repository](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1HMCD2JOhIjbTZnVl276P8uK9bua_pGxj).
